name: Shinzen Young
bio: Shinzen Young is an American mindfulness teacher known for his systematic, science-informed approach to meditation. He trained in Shingon Buddhism in Japan and has studied vipassana in the Theravada tradition. He developed the Unified Mindfulness system, which provides a comprehensive framework for mindfulness practice. He holds a PhD in Buddhist Studies and is known for his collaborations with neuroscientists studying the effects of meditation on the brain.
